before_parser_logic: _on_message() assumed a dict payload and called data.get(...), crashing on list-shaped messages with 'list' object has no attribute get'
after_parser_logic: _on_message() now normalizes incoming payloads into a list of items, processes dict items only, and safely handles both dict-shaped and list-shaped market stream messages.
sample_incoming_message_shape: list-shaped payload (confirmed indirectly by the prior runtime error and resolved by list normalization)
notes: No strategy or execution logic was changed.
This fix only normalized message shape handling in the realtime market parser.
